calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ahmed Farghaly in Propria Persona. Raghda Eldessouky in Propria Persona.

The Court asked the Parties why they felt they needed this. Ms. Eldessouky stated that they wanted this for future health care directive. The Court explained the procedure and stated that they have a marriage, and a certificate and letter from the US Embassy in Egypt acknowledging the marriage. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage was taken off calendar without prejudice to re-setting.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
